profile.title: Senior Software Engineer
profile.summary:
Hi, my name is Muhammad Asyrof bin Mohd Nasir, but you can call me Ash or Asyrof. I am a Senior Software Developer with nearly 8 years of experience working across various industries. I hold a bachelor's degree in Computer Science, majoring in System and Networking, from Universiti Tenaga Nasional (Energy University), graduating with Second Class Upper honors.

I'm passionate about exploring and learning more about Cloud Computing. My expertise includes C#, .NET Framework, and .NET Core, along with experience in MySQL, MSSQL, and NoSQL databases like Amazon DynamoDB. Additionally, I'm expanding my skills in Flutter, React Native, and Next.js.

experiences.company: Rosemallow Technologies Ptd Ltd (Client: E-Tech IT Sdn Bhd)
experiences.description:
- Maintained and enhanced Visitor Management System (bSwift) - .NET Core 8, JavaScript, React Native kiosk app (IC/Passport OCR), HikVision face terminal integration (ISAPI)
- Developed Event Registration System (ERS) - Next.js 15, .NET 10, web and kiosk platform
- Developed Ticketing System (iDex) - .NET 10, React 19, PostgreSQL, SLA monitoring, email automation
- Client-facing consultation - requirements gathering, solution proposals, and technical presentations
- Clean Architecture, CI/CD pipeline management

- Involved in creating RD, UI, SS, PT spec., PG Coding and PT Execution using Waterfall
- Document all the process flow involved
- Using version control like GitHub and GitHub Copilot for code efficiency
- Task management with Jira, Miro Board and Azure DevOps using Agile Scrum
- Planning, testing, develop and train junior software engineers
- Working with Power Automate, Power Apps, Next.JS from Fujitsu Japan
- Collaborating with Fujitsu teams across the world

Content Website Platform (CWP):
- Work closely with Team Leader and team of 6 Developers, 1 TL, 1 PE
- Progress Update 2 times Weekly

1) XEMarketer Portal:
- Maintaining portal in .NET Framework and bug fixes via Jira
- Develop and Integrate API for User Control System (UCS)

2) Operation Portal:
- Work closely with Amazon Web Services (AWS)
- Improve SSL certificate installation to Public LB and AWS
- Implement Bulk function to add Blacklist IP to AWS S3 then sync to AWS WAF

3) Security Portal:
- Improve VAPT Booking according to Jira ticket

4) Login Portal:
- Work with AWS and NoSQL DynamoDB
- Implement PartiQL for User Management for better throughput

Software Development:
- Developing Standalone POS System for Grocery Environment (C#, MySQL, Entity Framework)
- Developing .NET Core App for Qurban Coupon distribution
- Successfully create cloud server using DigitalOcean
- Successfully create and maintain MySQL server over cloud
- Successfully deploying .NET Core app to Linux environment
- Successfully deploying PHP web for Qurban Event
- Develop Attendance System based on hardware data (MySQL and MSSQL)
- Developing and integrating Twilio service for Qurban Coupon Management

Hardware:
- Implement face-recognition terminal for attendance access
- Implement wireless CCTV

- Develop and enhance POS System (VB.NET, MySQL)
- Integrate Credit Card Terminal with POS System (C#, MySQL)
- Integrate E-Wallet Payment with POS System (C# Web API, MySQL)
- Develop and enhance KDS (Kitchen Display System) (VB.NET, MySQL)
- Provide solutions and work closely with QC teams to fix Bug before release to Production

- Develop and enhance Stock Management System (C#, MSSQL)
- Gathering user requirement to develop Stocktaking System
- Develop and enhance Stocktaking System (C#, SQLite)
- Develop and enhance Asset Management System (C#, MSSQL)

- Perform Data entry for website
- Involve in front-end development

- Gathering user requirement from MARA
- Develop and enhance Payroll System for MARA
- Perform Server Migration for MARA
- Perform UAT on system testing with MARA
